backend/main.mo: Main backend actor implementing order management system with Product, Order, and Delivery types, supporting order placement with SMS notifications via HTTP outcalls, delivery scheduling, order history queries, and order status updates including cancellation.
backend/migration.mo: Migration module that transforms old Order records to new Order records by adding a phoneNumber field (defaulting to empty string) while preserving all other order data.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting three high-confidence features: PhonePe deep link fix, real-time total amount calculation, and delivery date display on the DeliverySchedule page.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON summary of frontend files describing the dairy-themed UI with Hindi support, navigation structure, product pages, order form with PhonePe QR integration, contact page, order history, delivery schedule, and React Query hooks.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom OKLCH color variables for light and dark modes, defining a warm dairy-themed color palette for backgrounds, foregrounds, borders, and UI components.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for the Parwati Dairy App with viewport meta tag and root div for React mounting.
frontend/src/App.tsx: TanStack Router configuration defining routes for home, products, order form, contact, order history, and delivery schedule pages, all wrapped in the Layout component.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: Responsive layout component with sticky header featuring Parwati Dairy logo, Hindi tagline, desktop and mobile navigation menus including Order History and Delivery Schedule links, and footer with caffeine.ai attribution.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: React Query hook that creates and manages the backend actor instance based on Internet Identity authentication state, automatically invalidating dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: React hook and context provider for Internet Identity authentication on ICP, managing login state, identity persistence, and delegation validation with configurable AuthClient options.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: React Query hooks for fetching order history and delivery schedules from the backend actor, with error handling and caching configuration.
frontend/src/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom warm dairy-themed color palette (creamy whites, oranges, earth tones) for light and dark modes, plus Hindi font support.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that sets up React Query, Internet Identity provider, and renders the root App component.
frontend/src/pages/Contact.tsx: Contact page displaying Parwati Dairy's address in Hazaribagh, phone numbers, and branding with location, phone, and mail icons.
frontend/src/pages/DeliverySchedule.tsx: Displays pending delivery schedules for customer orders with loading states, error handling, and formatted date/time information using order history queries.
frontend/src/pages/Home.tsx: Landing page with hero section featuring Parwati Dairy logo, product order buttons (Milk, Paneer, Ghee, Contact), and feature highlights in a warm dairy-themed design.
frontend/src/pages/OrderForm.tsx: Order form component with product selection, quantity input, real-time total calculation, form validation, WhatsApp order submission, and QR code payment integration with PhonePe deep linking for mobile devices.
frontend/src/pages/OrderHistory.tsx: Displays customer order history with status badges, date formatting, loading states, and error handling using React Query hooks for fetching order and delivery schedule data.
frontend/src/pages/Products.tsx: Products page displaying three dairy items (Milk, Paneer, Ghee) with prices, Hindi names, descriptions, and 'Order Now' buttons that navigate to the order form with pre-selected product.
frontend/src/utils/whatsapp.ts: Utility function that formats order data into a WhatsApp message and opens WhatsApp Web/app with pre-filled message to business number 918553965714.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom color scheme using OKLCH color space, typography plugins, custom fonts including Hindi support, and animation utilities for accordion and UI components.
project_state.json: Project metadata tracking architectural decisions, known issues (order history errors, QR code mobile integration, total calculation), existing features, and fix request status for the Parwati Dairy mobile ordering app.
